name: Pilapila
short_description: Pilapila is a charming 2D puzzle game with levels that are simple to understand but increasingly challenging to solve. Test your logic skills and climb your way to victory!
detailed_description:
Pilapila is a game of satisfying puzzles that are easy to understand but increasingly challenging to overcome. Test your puzzle solving skills in this charming and addicting game of logic!

Features

  • Over 70 unique levels, with new mechanics to discover along the way
  • Relaxing soundtrack of 10+ songs
  • Extra challenges to further test yourself and unlock bonus levels
  • Track your best scores on each level

More about Pilapila

The rules are simple: lacking the ability to jump, you must rearrange the blocks around you to progress through each level and reach the goal. Along the way you will find blocks that behave in mysterious ways; learn what they are capable of to make your way through Pilapila's clever tests of logic.

Challenge yourself even further by completing each level while moving as few blocks as possible to unlock mind-bending bonus levels.
